description: Async HTTP handler trait refactoring across tokio runtime, hyper server, and axum framework

merge_order.description: Refactor Runtime builder API to support configurable task schedulers, maintain backward-compatible default
Update hyper server to use new tokio Runtime builder API, adapt connection handler spawning
Update axum Server::bind to work with refactored hyper server builder and new tokio runtime configuration

breaking_changes: tokio: Runtime builder API change requires all consumers to update builder calls
hyper: Server implementation changes may affect custom connection handlers
axum: Server::bind API may change, affecting all axum application bootstrap code
